specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Our team understands that your boat is a significant investment, and we treat every job with that in mind.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle the full spectrum of what your vessel needs. Whether you're buying a boat and need a thorough pre-purchase survey and inspection, dealing with a fouled hull that requires professional underwater diving services, troubleshooting a marine air conditioning or climate control system in the middle of summer, or sorting out a plumbing or sanitation issue below deck — we've got the experience and equipment to get it done right.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, covering a 60-mile radius from our base in Annapolis, MD. Our clients range from weekend cruisers to serious offshore boaters, and we bring the same level of care and commitment to every job. If you're in the South Florida area and need a marine services partner you can count on, Ben's Boatworks is ready to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks performs thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess the structural integrity, mechanical condition, and overall seaworthiness of your vessel. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition and valuation report, we document everything so you can make informed decisions about your boat.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and other below-the-waterline work that keeps your vessel performing safely. We handle the underwater side of boat maintenance so you don't have to haul out every time something needs attention.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm weather. We diagnose refrigerant issues, clean heat exchangers, service raw water pumps, and troubleshoot electrical faults across a wide range of marine HVAC systems.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle marine plumbing and sanitation systems from freshwater pumps and through-hulls to holding tanks, marine heads, and waste treatment systems. Proper sanitation system maintenance is critical for compliance and onboard comfort, and we make sure everything is sealed, functioning, and up to standard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement dive
Marine air conditioning system service and refrigerant recharge
Holding tank and marine head repair or replacement
Insurance survey and vessel valuation documentation
Through-hull fitting inspection and raw water plumbing repair
Propeller inspection and line removal via underwater diving service
